sub_modules.highpass_fir_coeff_rom: Combinational ROM that packs the exact 101 signed high-pass FIR coefficients into a flat coefficient bus.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate block over the delayed sample vector and coefficient vector using a 64-bit accumulator.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_quantize: Combinational fixed-point output scaler that arithmetic right shifts the accumulator by 15 bits into the 24-bit output width.
sub_modules.highpass_fir_zero_extend_valid: Combinational valid-path helper used by the top-level wrapper; sequential valid timing is registered in the top module.
